Package javadraw

Interface CustomRenderable

All Known Implementing Classes:
CheckBox, Component, CustomPolygon, Image, MultiRenderable, RadioButton, RadioButtonGroup, ToggleButton
public interface CustomRenderable
Designation interface for Renderables that are special or set apart from default Renderables in some way.
